name: case02_encrypt_job
description: Case 02: Encrypted file ingestion - S3 pipe-delimited source (post-decrypt) with type casting to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1": {"S3CsvSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Escaper": "\\", "Exclusions": [], "Name": "S3 CSV Source - case02_encrypt", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case02_encrypt/"], "QuoteChar": "quote", "Recurse": true, "Separator": "comma", "WithHeader": true}}, "node-2": {"SparkSQL": {"Inputs": ["node-1"], "Name": "SQL Query", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "SqlAliases": [{"Alias": "myDataSource", "From": "node-1"}], "SqlQuery": "SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(person_id), '') AS PERSON_ID, NULLIF(TRIM(card_id), '') AS CARD_ID, NULLIF(TRIM(card_number_mask), '') AS CARD_NUMBER_MASK, NULLIF(TRIM(card_type), '') AS CARD_TYPE, NULLIF(TRIM(card_brand), '') AS CARD_BRAND, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(issue_date), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS ISSUE_DATE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(expiry_date), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS EXPIRY_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(card_status), '') AS CARD_STATUS, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(credit_limit), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CREDIT_LIMIT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(available_limit), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS AVAILABLE_LIMIT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(cash_limit), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CASH_LIMIT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(current_balance), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CURRENT_BALANCE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(outstanding_balance), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS OUTSTANDING_BALANCE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(min_payment_due), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS MIN_PAYMENT_DUE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(total_spending), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS TOTAL_SPENDING, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(interest_rate), '') AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS INTEREST_RATE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(statement_date), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS STATEMENT_DATE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(payment_due_date), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS PAYMENT_DUE_DATE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(last_payment_date), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS LAST_PAYMENT_DATE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(last_payment_amount), '') AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS LAST_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, NULLIF(TRIM(over_limit_flag), '') AS OVER_LIMIT_FLAG, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(delinquency_days), '') AS INT) AS DELINQUENCY_DAYS, NULLIF(TRIM(block_code), '') AS BLOCK_CODE, NULLIF(TRIM(fraud_flag), '') AS FRAUD_FLAG, NULLIF(TRIM(write_off_flag), '') AS WRITE_OFF_FLAG, NULLIF(TRIM(product_code), '') AS PRODUCT_CODE, NULLIF(TRIM(rewards_type), '') AS REWARDS_TYPE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(annual_fee), '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS ANNUAL_FEE, NULLIF(TRIM(waive_annual_flag), '') AS WAIVE_ANNUAL_FLAG, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(version_date), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS VERSION_DATE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(etl_update_date), '') AS TIMESTAMP) AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE person_id IS NOT NULL AND card_id IS NOT NULL"}}, "node-3": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip",
